About

The person behind
the code

"Driven by a passion for programming that began in high school, I bridge software development and artificial intelligence."

I chose to study computer science to turn my interest into expertise. Along the way, I became a versatile developer — comfortable with the full stack, data science tooling (Power BI, Looker, ML models), and real-world deployment challenges. I'm a lifelong learner, deeply interested in the future of technology, and always ready to adapt to new challenges.

Projects

Things I've built

Monklingo
Monk Alms Offering Route Tracker

A platform providing real-time routes and schedules of Buddhist monks' alms rounds, featuring an interactive map and community engagement section.

🔍
🔍
  • Interactive Leaflet.js map with monk route visualization
  • Social login via Facebook & Google (OAuth)
  • Community dashboard with rankings & news feed
  • Admin panel: routes, chat rooms, user management
PythonDjango Tailwind CSSJavaScript Leaflet.jsPostgreSQL ngrok

SurveyHospital
Hospital Satisfaction Survey System

Kiosk-based patient satisfaction survey system built for Trakanphuetphon Hospital. Owned the full development lifecycle from database design to UI optimization.

🔍
🔍
  • Multi-language support (Thai / English)
  • Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
  • Automated email alerts for low ratings
  • Department-level filtering & customization
